caption: A woman with dark hair and glasses is positioned centrally against a solid black background. She wears a light green, patterned tunic with a small V-neckline and a dark beaded necklace. A small lapel microphone is clipped to the front of her shirt. In the bottom left corner of the frames, a circular gold logo is visible next to the text "NPTEL". The woman is speaking, and her facial expressions and mouth movements shift subtly as the sequence progresses. In the initial frames, her mouth is slightly open, and she maintains a neutral gaze toward the camera. As the sequence continues, her expression changes slightly, and her mouth opens further, indicating active speech. There are no other people or objects in the scene, and the background remains constant throughout.
